fixture: 073_qualified_schema_names

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE SCHEMA sales
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    CREATE SCHEMA archive
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 3:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE sales.widgets (id INTEGER NOT NULL, label VARCHAR(20))
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 4:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE archive.widgets (id INTEGER NOT NULL, label VARCHAR(20))
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 5:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO sales.widgets VALUES (1, 'sales')
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 6:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO archive.widgets VALUES (1, 'archive')
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 7:
  sql:
    SELECT sales.widgets.id, sales.widgets.label FROM sales.widgets WHERE sales.widgets.id = 1
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
      [1] label VARCHAR(20)
    rows:
      [0] 1 | "sales"

statement 8:
  sql:
    SELECT archive.widgets.id, archive.widgets.label FROM archive.widgets WHERE archive.widgets.id = 1
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
      [1] label VARCHAR(20)
    rows:
      [0] 1 | "archive"

statement 9:
  sql:
    UPDATE sales.widgets SET label = 'closed' WHERE sales.widgets.id = 1
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 10:
  sql:
    DELETE FROM archive.widgets WHERE archive.widgets.id = 1
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 11:
  sql:
    SELECT sales.widgets.id, sales.widgets.label FROM sales.widgets
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
      [1] label VARCHAR(20)
    rows:
      [0] 1 | "closed"

statement 12:
  sql:
    SELECT archive.widgets.id, archive.widgets.label FROM archive.widgets
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
      [1] label VARCHAR(20)
    rows:
      <empty>

statement 13:
  sql:
    DROP TABLE sales.widgets
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 14:
  sql:
    DROP TABLE archive.widgets
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 15:
  sql:
    DROP SCHEMA sales
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 16:
  sql:
    DROP SCHEMA archive
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0
